Verified Petition To: 1) Contest Validity Of The Purported Restatement Due To Lack Of Capacity; 2) Contest Validity Of The Purported Restatement Due To Undue Influence 3) Find That Respondent Committed Elder Financial Abuse Against Decedent; And 4) Recover Double Damages And Attorneys' Fees
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Continued To May-20-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jenni L. Harmon for James H. Goldberg, Marc Goldberg, and Jane Rioseco, Petitioners (via Zoom).
Nicholas Yang for Robin Gascon, Respondent.

The court noted that certain procedural deficiencies needed to be corrected before proceeding. Petitioners were instructed to submit a proposed order, file a proof of service of the notice of hearing on the required Judicial Council Form DE-115, and file a proof of service regarding the proposed order in compliance with Local Rule 14.7(A)(4).

The court continued the matter to May 20, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow for these corrections.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
